notes: Single self-contained HTML, no libraries. Full-page canvas with DPR-aware rendering. Layered parallax: stars, sunset sky, clouds, two mountain layers, rolling hills, trees (pine+round), poles, bushes, road with center dashes, dust particles. Car features: body, cabin, windows with reflections, headlight glow, taillight glow, bumper, spinning wheels with hubcaps/spokes. dt-based animation. Body bob + pitch. Vignette overlay.
